title: Epic_Fight_X_MajruszsDifficulty
description: The project is an epic fight animation of the Majruszs Difficulty weapons
body:
- I animated some of the weapons and some mobs in the Majrusz's Progressive Difficulty mod for the Epic fight mod

- Note!!! Required Items:
1. Epic Fight:[https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)
2. Majrusz's Progressive:[https://modrinth.com/mod/majruszs-progressive-difficulty](https://modrinth.com/mod/majruszs-progressive-difficulty)

- Only the following animations have been added at this time：
1. wither sword
2. cursed armor
3. giant![cursed armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4600b3f64a1e0466698064a7df7d1b739e0ddf4.jpeg)![giant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e96edf41bcb3dc1bfb02dbf2d9c3a7f9246c79c.jpeg)![wither sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c96e36d55f6d55856d1039462da9af32f2de580.jpeg)
